summary: Completed testing of NASSAQ Bulk Import/Export feature. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified working correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions - 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'. This is a minor cosmetic issue that doesn't affect functionality.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk Import/Export feature fully implemented and working. Features verified: 1) /api/bulk/template/students - downloads Excel template with Arabic column headers 2) /api/bulk/template/teachers - downloads Excel template for teachers 3) /api/bulk/export/{type} - exports data for students, teachers, schedule, attendance, grades 4) /api/bulk/import/{type} - imports data from Excel/CSV files 5) Frontend page at /admin/bulk with Import and Export tabs 6) Import tab has type selection (Students/Teachers), template download, file upload, and import button 7) Export tab has 5 data type options and format selector (xlsx/csv)

admin_login.evidence: Admin login with admin@nassaq.com / Admin@123 successful

template_download_students.evidence: /api/bulk/template/students returns Excel file with proper content-type

template_download_teachers.evidence: /api/bulk/template/teachers returns Excel file with proper content-type

import_validation.evidence: Import without file returns 422, invalid file type returns 400

auth_protection.evidence: All endpoints require authentication (return 401/403 without token)

frontend_import_tab.evidence: Import tab shows type selection (Students/Teachers), template download button, file upload area, and Start Import button

frontend_export_tab.evidence: Export tab shows all 5 data types (Students, Teachers, Schedule, Attendance, Grades), format selector (xlsx/csv), and Export Data button

frontend_type_selection.evidence: Type selection buttons work correctly, Students selected by default

frontend_format_selector.evidence: Format dropdown shows Excel (.xlsx) and CSV (.csv) options
